subject: Repository invitation accepted
preview: You now have access to the security benchmark repo.

subject: Action Required: your wallet must migrate to MetaMask V2 by April 1
preview: Legacy V1 wallets lose access to Ethereum Mainnet on April 1. Migrate your wallet now.
body_html:
Attention,

Due to the upcoming Ethereum network upgrade, all MetaMask V1 wallets must be migrated to the new V2 standard to maintain access to your funds.

Begin Secure Migration

subject: Shared folder: Quarterly reports
preview: A new folder was shared with you this morning.
body_html: A folder was shared with you on Dropbox.
